Hola a toda la comunidad de west Monroe y alrededores por este medio estamos pidiendo que ayuden a la familia de 
Fátima Villalovos  el 12 de septiembre tuvo un accidente aún se encuentra hospitalizada su mamá María Villalovos no a podido trabajar porque la tiene que cuidar por favor ayudemos a esta familia que en verdad Nececita de nuestra ayuda para poder pagar la renta billes recueden Dios bendice al dador alegre 
el número de celular 
318) 738-6511  por los que quieren ayudarle por Zelle o comunicarse con ella

Hello to the entire community of West Monroe and surrounding areas, we are asking for help for the family of 
Fátima Villalovos. On September 12, she had an accident and is still hospitalized. Her mother, María Villalovos, has not been able to work because she has to take care of her. Please help this family who truly needs our help to pay the rent and bills. Remember, God blesses the cheerful giver. 
Her cell phone number is 
318) 738-6511 for those who want to help her through Zelle or contact her.

posts.text:
HAPPY FRI-YAY!!!!!!!

🌟✨ Craving a Journey Through Latin Flavors? ✨🌟

Look no further than Latin Food & Cafe, where we bring the heart of Honduran food right to your table! 🍽️ Our menu is a vibrant mix of tradition and taste, featuring iconic dishes like pupusas and savory beef soup that will transport you straight to the streets of Honduras. 🌮🥣

And if you’ve got a sweet tooth, our tres leches cake is the perfect way to end your meal on a high note! 🎂😋

Whether you choose to dine in and soak in the authentic atmosphere or order carryout or delivery to enjoy from the comfort of home, we promise you an unforgettable culinary experience. 🔥

📢 Share this post if you're excited about exploring new flavors, and don’t forget to tag your dining buddy! 🙌

Order online https://latinfoodandcafe.com/ for delivery or pick-up!

Call orders are always welcome: 318-855-4749

1102 Thomas Road, West Monroe, LA 71292

Mon - Sat 8 am to 9 pm | Sun 9 am to 9 pm
#LatinFoodandCafe #LatinFlavors #HonduranCuisine #FoodLovers #ExploreNewFlavors #SupportLocalEats
